languages.text: Как ни сильно было оружие врага, его оказалось недостаточно для того, чтобы сломить разум истинного Вольного Торговца. Каждый шаг давался мне с неимоверным трудом — и все же, мой путь продолжился.
For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.
languages.original_text: Как ни сильно было оружие врага, его оказалось недостаточно для того, чтобы сломить разум истинного Вольного Торговца. Каждый шаг давался мне с неимоверным трудом — и все же, мой путь продолжился.

traits.locale_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.
For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.
For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.
For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

languages.text: Pese a su formidable poder, el arma del enemigo no logró doblegar la voluntad de un verdadero Comerciante Independiente. Cada paso exigía un esfuerzo considerable, pero avancé.
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: Pese a su formidable poder, el arma del enemigo no logró doblegar la voluntad de un verdadero Comerciante Independiente. Cada paso exigía un esfuerzo considerable, pero avancé.

languages.text: Malgré sa redoutable puissance, l'arme ennemie ne put de briser l'esprit {mf|d'un véritable libre-marchand|d'une véritable libre-marchande}. Chaque pas me demandait un effort considérable, et pourtant, je continuai d'avancer.
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: Malgré sa redoutable puissance, l'arme ennemie ne put de briser l'esprit {mf|d'un véritable libre-marchand|d'une véritable libre-marchande}. Chaque pas me demandait un effort considérable, et pourtant, je continuai d'avancer.

languages.text: 敌人的武器强大到骇人，但仍不足以击溃一位真正行商浪人的意志。我迈出的每一步都无比艰难，但我依然继续前行。
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: 敌人的武器强大到骇人，但仍不足以击溃一位真正行商浪人的意志。我迈出的每一步都无比艰难，但我依然继续前行。

languages.text: Trotz ihrer bemerkenswerten Macht konnte die Waffe des Feindes den Willen eines wahren Freihändlers nicht brechen. Obschon mich jeder Schritt enorme Kraft kostete, ging ich weiter.
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: Trotz ihrer bemerkenswerten Macht konnte die Waffe des Feindes den Willen eines wahren Freihändlers nicht brechen. Obschon mich jeder Schritt enorme Kraft kostete, ging ich weiter.

languages.text: Düşmanın silahı, tüm zorlu gücüne rağmen gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in zihnini kırmayı başaramadı. Attığım her adım inanılmaz bir çaba gerektiriyordu ama yine de yürümeye devam ettim.
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: Düşmanın silahı, tüm zorlu gücüne rağmen gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in zihnini kırmayı başaramadı. Attığım her adım inanılmaz bir çaba gerektiriyordu ama yine de yürümeye devam ettim.

languages.text: 敵の強力な兵器は、真のローグトレーダーの心を折ることはできなかった。一歩一歩が大変な努力を要したが、私は歩み続けた。
languages.original_text: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.

traits.locale_text: 敵の強力な兵器は、真のローグトレーダーの心を折ることはできなかった。一歩一歩が大変な努力を要したが、私は歩み続けた。
